response.justification: Strong senior engineer with 15+ years of diverse experience, solid open-source credentials (GISCollective), Linux familiarity, and architecture exposure. However, the role demands German C1 (candidate only has Basic German), explicit team leadership/management track record, and UML/formal architecture modeling expertise — all of which are weak or unstated. Technical depth is there, but the leadership and language requirements are significant gaps for a Head of Development position.
strengths: 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and backend with multi-language fluency including Linux/Python-adjacent ecosystems
Founded and maintains GISCollective, an open-source platform — demonstrates architectural ownership and alignment with open-source/digital sovereignty values
Track record of mentoring via workshops, dojos, and Selenium course delivery, suggesting teaching and team-enablement capability
concerns: German listed as Basic only — fails the explicit C1 requirement, which is a hard blocker for client-facing consulting in DACH
No explicit people-management or Head-of-Development experience; titles are individual-contributor Senior/Staff, not leadership
UML, formal requirements management, and compliance/risk experience are not mentioned on the resume

key_factors.factor: Strong open-source and polyglot engineering background
